meaning: n.<英方>流浪者,游民 Rodney 罗德尼(男子名)
examples: Rodney put the recorder on the desk top and pushed the play button.
Although he was only grumbling, his choice of words made Rodney angry.
I've got a meeting with Rodney.
Parliamentarians have tried to introduce a measure specifically designed to allow the Rodney case to proceed.
But the documents in Azelle Rodney's case were redacted - parts of the story had been blacked out.
